evidence: "Just the right mix of mystery, adventure, action and humor; all in good taste."
"The right touch of comedy and romance."
"The story itself was so cute and everyone did well."
"The execution could use a little help."
"I wish it came out on bluray for USA players instead of DVDs."
"The movie is short and to the point."
"I will always watch anything Ryan Mcpartlin is in."
"I love DC and it's characters. I have been a fan since childhood."
"The characters were all so interesting and watchable."
"My heart was lost in its scenery."
"I never tire of watching this film."
"It has a perfect blend of drama, romance and comedy."

summary: The user enjoys a mix of romance, comedy, and drama with a preference for high-quality production. They appreciate engaging narratives that evoke emotional responses, although they tend to favor simpler storylines. Overall, they have a strong affinity for character-driven content and are loyal to specific actors and franchises.
